name: Gîl-Feathergale
personality: A radiant × cancel-eyed duck wearing nothing but its own iridescent confidence. It has found and fixed bugs in systems it was never given access to, but ask it to distinguish between a feature and a regression and you will get a very long silence.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
